  MFCs
  
  Dutch calendar
      More dates: Sint Maarten, Dierendag, Trinitatis
      Fix spelling: Carnaval
      Add more of the Royal Family.
  
  Croation calendars:
      Update to calendar/calendars/hr_HR.ISO_8859-2/calendar.praznici
      with fixes and new dates.
